span.p: Redis LPUSH retrain task to queue

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NGINX Reverse Proxy :80
Routes:
/api/* -> API:8000
/mlflow/* -> MLflow:5000
/prometheus/* -> Prometheus:9090
/grafana/* -> Grafana:3000

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FASTAPI Inference Service :8000
Endpoints:
POST /api/predict
GET /api/health
GET /api/metrics
Dependencies:
* Loads model from MLflow Production stage
* Caches preprocessed features via Redis
* Publishes retrain tasks to Redis queue

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MLFLOW Tracking Server :5000
Components:
* Tracking UI for experiment visualization
* Model Registry for churn_model
* Artifact Store S3 compatible
Model Stages: None to Production after training

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CELERY Worker no external port
Consumes tasks from Redis queue:
* retrain triggers training pipeline via subprocess
* batch_predict for batch prediction
Loads model and feature columns from MLflow

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
POSTGRESQL Database :5432
Stores MLflow metadata:
* experiment runs
* parameters and metrics
* tags and registered model versions

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
REDIS Cache and Broker :6379
Dual Role:
1. Celery Broker task queue for retraining
2. Feature Cache TTL 3600 seconds
Stores preprocessed features by input hash
Also stores prediction statistics:
* total_predictions
* avg_confidence
* churn_rate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GARAGE S3 Storage :3900
Stores artifacts via S3 API:
* Trained model in pkl format
* columns.pkl feature names
* Logged plots and files
Bucket: mlflow
Credentials via AWS environment variables

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PROMETHEUS Metrics Server :9090
Scrape targets interval 15 seconds:
* API :8000/metrics
* MLflow :5000/metrics
Stores time-series metrics

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LOKI Log Aggregation :3100
Receives logs from Fluent-bit
Stores indexed logs with labels
Query language: LogQL

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
GRAFANA Visualization :3000
Data sources:
* Prometheus for metrics
* Loki for logs
Dashboards:
* Model performance metrics
* System health status
* Request rate and latency
* Log exploration interface

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FLUENT-BIT Log Collector :2020
Input: HTTP JSON logs on port 8888
Filter: JSON parser
Output: Forward to Loki on port 3100

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TRAINER one-shot run
Pipeline executed by Celery Worker:
1. Load CSV file
2. Feature engineering one-hot encoding
3. Handle missing values
4. Optuna hyperparameter tuning
* 15 trials with 5-fold cross validation
* Optimization metric is ROC-AUC
5. Train Random Forest classifier
6. Evaluate metrics including accuracy precision recall F1 AUC
7. Log to MLflow with params metrics artifacts
8. Register model as churn_model
9. Transition new version to Production stage
This is NOT an async task, it blocks the worker

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
